vibe: Premium editorial with Indian spiritual accents. Authoritative, devout, technologically advanced but spiritually grounded. Cinematic and moody.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-12, p-16, gap-8) to create an editorial, high-end feel.
spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Tetris Bento Grid for services and projects. High asymmetry.
spacing_and_layout.surface_strategy: Crystal Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl, saturate-150, 1px gold-tinted inner border) for floating headers and key focus cards. Solid flat backgrounds for dense tech specs.

interactions.hover: Subtle -translate-y-1, glow increase on border from rgba(212,175,55,0.15) to rgba(212,175,55,0.5).

components_instructions.buttons: Flat background with 1px border. Primary CTA: bg-[#D4AF37] text-[#060A14] hover:bg-[#FF9933]. Secondary CTA: bg-transparent border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37]/10.
components_instructions.cards: Use 'The Tracing Beam' or 'Glassmorphism' style. background: rgba(10,17,40,0.4), backdrop-blur-md, border: 1px solid rgba(212,175,55,0.15).
components_instructions.navigation: Sticky, Crystal Glass surface. z-50. Minimalist logo on left, links center, CTA right.
components_instructions.forms: Shadcn UI customized. Inputs must have bg-[#0A1128] border-rgba(212,175,55,0.2) focus:border-[#FF9933].
components_instructions.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone weight) to match the premium editorial feel.
components_instructions.charts: Recharts for Live Dashboard representations, using gold and saffron hues.

pages.name: Home
sections: Hero (Cinematic dark overlay + Temple/Tech BG, Title: Technology with Devotion., CTAs)
Services Grid (9 Core Services in an asymmetrical bento box)
Major Projects Showcase (Horizontal scroll or distinct cards of the 6 major temples)
Why Choose Us (Trust metrics, govt registration status)
Vision (Future of Smart Temples, immersive text overlay)

pages.name: Services
sections: Detailed Grid of 9 Core Services (ERP, QMS, Digital ID, Mobile Apps, QR Tech, WhatsApp Bot, Photo Ticketing, Cloud, Dashboards)

pages.name: Projects
sections: 6 Temple Projects with Work Order status, Implementations, Tech used

pages.name: Technology
sections: Enterprise Tech Stack Map (React, Node, SQL Server, Azure, Android, PWA, REST APIs)

image_urls.description: Stunning temple gopuram illuminated at night, used for Hero section with heavy dark navy overlay (bg-black/70 or navy/80).
Abstract streaks of golden light against black. Use for Technology or Vision section backgrounds.
Blue digital data network. Use for Tech Stack or Products ecosystem.
Corporate IT professional. Use for About Us or Careers.
Stunning illuminated temple. Use as visual fallback for the 6 Major Temple Projects.

testing.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. No arbitrary shades of blue or yellow. Stick to #060A14, #0A1128, #D4AF37, #FF9933.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for structural layouts in marketing sections. Use Shadcn components for interactive logic (Forms, Navigation Menu, Cards).
Ensure 'Cormorant Garamond' is imported from Google Fonts for headings, and 'Outfit' for body.
For the Hero image, use a dark gradient overlay to ensure text contrast (e.g., 'bg-gradient-to-r from-[#060A14] via-[#0A1128]/80 to-transparent').
Include 'data-testid' on all buttons, links, form inputs, and major section wrappers.
Use React Router (react-router-dom) to handle the 9-page navigation.
Include @phosphor-icons/react or lucide-react for the services icons.
